## Reinforcement Learning Project in R/C++

During my Masters in Data Science at Barcelona GSE, I took an interesting course about reinforcement learning that covered both theory and practical coding exercises. Since RL involves coputationally expensive algorithms, I used C++ for some of the course work: [link to problem set involving C++](/www/html/rl_cpp_project.html). For the full course overview including work on dynamic programming, multi-armed bandits, Gaussian processes and Bayesian optimization, see [here](https://github.com/pat-alt/reinforcement_learning/tree/main).
